name: Phantom Pain
description: You target a creature within a short (10 unit) distance and cause them to feel a phantom pain if your spell check beats the target's logic. While you concentrate on this spell, the target takes 4 psychic damage at the end of their turn if they either moved or made an attack on their turn. Each time they take damage, make a spell check against their logic; if you fail, the spell ends.
charge: You also choose a mind, physique or finesse skill check that the target must roll with a penalty dice for the duration of this spell.
